name: 001_basic_file_copy.sh
expected: destination file has same contents as source

name: 002_multiple_sources_directory.sh
expected: target directory contains two copied files

name: 003_target_directory_t.sh
expected: source is copied under target directory

name: 004_no_target_directory_T_error.sh
expected: utility exits nonzero

name: 005_recursive_R_directory.sh
expected: nested file is present in copied directory

name: 006_archive_preserves_symlink.sh
expected: copied link remains a symbolic link

name: 007_no_dereference_P_symlink.sh
expected: destination is a symbolic link

name: 008_dereference_L_symlink.sh
expected: destination is not a symbolic link

name: 009_command_line_H_symlink.sh
exercises: -H follows command-line symbolic links in SOURCE
expected: copied tree contains referent directory file

name: 010_symbolic_link_s.sh
expected: destination symlink points to source path

name: 011_hard_link_l.sh
expected: source and destination have the same device and inode

name: 012_preserve_p_mode.sh
expected: destination mode is preserved as 640

name: 013_preserve_timestamps.sh
expected: destination mtime equals source mtime

name: 014_no_preserve_timestamps.sh
expected: destination mtime differs from old source mtime

name: 015_attributes_only.sh
expected: destination file has zero size

name: 016_parents_full_source_name.sh
expected: full source pathname is created under target directory

name: 017_backup_with_suffix.sh
expected: custom-suffix backup contains old destination data

name: 018_short_b_backup_suffix_env.sh
expected: environment-suffix backup contains old destination data

name: 019_force_backup_same_file.sh
exercises: special case: -f with --backup when SOURCE and DEST are same file
expected: backup of source is created

name: 020_no_clobber_n.sh
expected: existing destination content is unchanged

name: 021_update_none.sh
expected: existing destination is skipped without replacement

name: 022_update_older_replaces.sh
expected: older destination is replaced by newer source

name: 023_u_skips_newer_destination.sh
expected: newer destination is not replaced

name: 024_interactive_i_decline.sh
expected: negative response leaves destination unchanged

name: 025_remove_destination_breaks_link.sh
expected: replaced destination no longer shares inode with old hard link

name: 026_strip_trailing_slashes.sh
stderr:
cp: cannot stat '/tmp/tmp.JmvNIQk85R/link.txt/': Not a directory
cp --strip-trailing-slashes failed
expected: symlink source with trailing slash is copied after slash removal

name: 027_nonexistent_source_error.sh
exercises: documented SOURCE must exist to be copied
expected: utility exits nonzero for nonexistent source

name: 028_update_none_fail_error.sh
expected: utility exits nonzero
